mapper.sql: id, member_id, change_type, points_change, points_before, points_after, change_reason, reference_type, reference_id, store_id, operator_id, operator_name, expire_time, record_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM points_record WHERE member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY record_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_record ( member_id, change_type, points_change, points_before, points_after, change_reason, reference_type, reference_id, store_id, operator_id, operator_name, expire_time, record_time ) VALUES ( #{pointsRecord.memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsRecord.changeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pointsRecord.pointsChange,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pointsRecord.pointsBefore,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pointsRecord.pointsAfter,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pointsRecord.changeReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pointsRecord.referenceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pointsRecord.referenceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsRecord.storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsRecord.operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pointsRecord.operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pointsRecord.expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{pointsRecord.recordTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(points_change), 0) FROM points_record WHERE member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > NOW())

SELECT pr.id, pr.member_id, m.member_no, m.name as member_name, CASE WHEN pr.points_change > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END as points_type, CASE WHEN pr.points_change > 0 THEN '获得' ELSE '使用' END as points_type_name, ABS(pr.points_change) as points, pr.points_before as beforePoints, pr.points_after as afterPoints, COALESCE(pr.change_reason, pr.reference_type) as description, pr.change_reason, pr.reference_type, pr.reference_id, pr.store_id, pr.operator_id, pr.operator_name, pr.expire_time, pr.record_time as create_time FROM points_record pr LEFT JOIN member m ON pr.member_id = m.id
AND m.member_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberNo}, '%')
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberName}, '%')
AND (
pr.points_change > 0
pr.points_change < 0
1=1
)
AND pr.record_time >= #{startDate}
AND pr.record_time <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY pr.record_time DESC
SELECT FROM points_record WHERE expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time <= NOW() AND change_type = 'earn'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.member_id) as totalMembers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.points_change > 0 THEN pr.points_change ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalPoints, COALESCE(AVG(m.current_points), 0) as averagePoints, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pr.record_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN pr.member_id END) as activeMembers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.points_change > 0 AND pr.record_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN pr.points_change ELSE 0 END), 0) as thisMonthEarned, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pr.points_change < 0 AND pr.record_time >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN ABS(pr.points_change) ELSE 0 END), 0) as thisMonthUsed FROM points_record pr LEFT JOIN member m ON pr.member_id = m.id WHERE (pr.expire_time IS NULL OR pr.expire_time > NOW())
